findings.detail: The template choices are there, but the names don’t tell me what kind of business look I’m picking at a glance.
findings.proposed_solution: Use plain-language template labels like calm, premium, or energetic so I can choose faster.

findings.detail: There are only 3 palette options, so it feels a little limited if I want to quickly match my brand.
findings.proposed_solution: Show palette previews with more descriptive names to make branding easier.

findings.detail: The chat box accepts input, but it’s not obvious what it does after I send a message.
findings.proposed_solution: After I send a chat message, show a clear response or next step so I know the help is working.

warnings.detail: The template choices are there, but the names don’t tell me what kind of business look I’m picking at a glance.
There are only 3 palette options, so it feels a little limited if I want to quickly match my brand.
